Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a list of targeted open ended questions to clarify the described property onboarding process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The questions should aim to uncover missing details understand decision criteria clarify roles and responsibilities verify timing and sequencing and learn about how exceptions are handled

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So I need to generate a list of questions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Ill think about the process steps 1 Landlord contacts regional office property coordinator reviews docs 2 Coordinator requests missing docs then verifies and records property details into database 3 Assigning a dedicated property manager based on workload geographic specialization experience track record 4 Introductory call meeting between manager and landlord to align expectations pets maintenance payment channels 5 Manager schedules photographer and inspector 6 Inspector report if issues work with landlord to fix Once passes inspection digital marketing team creates listings brochures updates pricing models 7 Property activated in portal tenant screening applications credit checks employment verification references If multiple tenants negotiate promotional discounts prioritize longer lease 8 Lease finalization security deposit move in date 9 Quality checks compliance officer reviews lease for fair housing financial analyst verifies pricing IT checks online listing data integration Throughout communication across regional offices landlords managers support teams tracked via email CRM project management tools

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Missing details I need to ask about the sequence of steps dependencies timeframes

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Decision criteria for manager assignment what exactly are the metrics for workload track record How is experience with similar property types defined

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The introductory call who initiates it how soon after assignment How are special conditions documented

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The process of scheduling photographer inspector are they internal or third party What triggers the marketing team

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: After inspection passes how long does it take to create listings How are pricing models updated

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Activation step what does it involve exactly

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Tenant screening who conducts it property manager or leasing agent how are decisions made

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Multiple tenants how is negotiation handled who approves discounts

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Quality checks at what point do compliance financial IT checks occur before or after lease signing Are they sequential

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Exceptions like properties requiring special insurance landlords with custom lease clauses how are they handled who approves

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Communication tracking what specific tools and how are handoffs managed Need to understand SLAs bottlenecks

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I should craft open ended questions covering these areas ensuring they are not SQL implementation details

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill structure the questions by process phase but I can just list them Ensure they are open ended how what when who can you describe

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill produce a list with a brief intro then numbered questions Ill aim for 12 to 15 questions

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Ill include questions about decision criteria manager assignment roles who does what in tenant screening and quality checks timing how long does onboarding take any deadlines exceptions custom clauses special insurance refusal to fix inspection issues communication and handoffs

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Also ask about what triggers the transition from one step to the next for example what confirms that documentation is verified what confirms inspection passed who activates the property

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Also ask about tracking progress and escalation paths

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: And about the marketing teams pricing models how real time are market trends and how often updated

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: Also after move in is there any post onboarding review

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The description ends with quality checks after lease finalization but before move in It says Once a suitable tenant is chosen the property manager finalizes the lease agreement collects the security deposit and schedules a move in date Finally the process includes a series of quality checks

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The order seems quality checks after lease finalization but could be afterwards or in parallel Need to clarify sequencing are these checks performed before move in or after

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The process aims to on board a rental property so after tenant moves in its done but the quality checks might occur after lease signing but before activation Ill ask

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Ill avoid asking for SQL

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Ill make sure the questions are purely conceptual
